name: The Kalalau Trail
short_description: A first-person 3D version of the famous Kalalau Trail on the Hawaiian island of Kauai. Vast open world includes the full length of the trail. Many surprises and easter eggs, many famous sights along the trail.
detailed_description:
Removed from sale

Thank you for your support but this app has been removed from sale.


About the Game

Video game version of the famous Kalalau Trail on the island of Kauai. Walk the Kalalau Trail all the way from the start, at the end of road at Ke'e Beach, to Hanakapi'ai Beach, inland to Hanakapi'ai Falls, and then onward to Hanakoa Camp and Kalalau Valley and the Beach. Find and recycle all the discarded water bottles to complete the trek.
